languages.text: "Сержант-инструктор Онджей Йоваха получил удар "булавой" Погонщицы. Раны от шипов мы заштопали, но, похоже, у него внутренние повреждения. Будь у нас побольше времени, мы бы что-нибудь придумали".

"Drill Sergeant Ondzej Jovakha was struck by one of the Drover's maces. We sutured the wounds from the spikes, but he seems to have internal injuries. Given more time, we might find a way to help him."
languages.original_text: "Сержант-инструктор Онджей Йоваха получил удар "булавой" Погонщицы. Раны от шипов мы заштопали, но, похоже, у него внутренние повреждения. Будь у нас побольше времени, мы бы что-нибудь придумали".

traits.locale_text: "Drill Sergeant Ondzej Jovakha was struck by one of the Drover's maces. We sutured the wounds from the spikes, but he seems to have internal damage. Given more time, we might have found a way."

"Drill Sergeant Ondzej Jovakha was struck by one of the Drover's maces. We sutured the wounds from the spikes, but he seems to have internal injuries. Given more time, we might find a way to help him."

"Sergeant-Instructor Ondzej Jovakha was struck by one of the Drover's maces. We sutured the puncture wounds from the spikes, but the patient appears to have multiple sites of internal bleeding that are beyond remedy now."
"Drill Sergeant Ondzej Jovakha was struck by one of the Drover's maces. We sutured the wounds from the spikes, but he seems to have internal damage. Given more time, we might have found a way."

"Drill Sergeant Ondzej Jovakha was struck by one of the Drover's maces. We sutured the wounds from the spikes, but he seems to have internal injuries. Given more time, we might find a way to help him."

languages.text: 「軍曹教官オンジェイ・ヨヴァハは、ドローヴァーのメイスの一撃を受けた。スパイクによる穿刺創は縫合したが、患者には複数箇所に内出血があり、もはや手の施しようがない。」
languages.original_text: "Sergeant-Instructor Ondzej Jovakha was struck by one of the Drover's maces. We sutured the puncture wounds from the spikes, but the patient appears to have multiple sites of internal bleeding that are beyond remedy now."

traits.locale_text: 軍曹教官オンジェイ・ヨヴァハは、ドローヴァーのメイスの一撃を受けた。スパイクによる穿刺創は縫合したが、患者には複数箇所に内出血があり、もはや手の施しようがない。

languages.text: « Le sergent-instructeur Ondzej Jovakha a été blessé par une des masses du Chasseur. Nous avons refermé les plaies causées par les épines, mais il semble avoir des lésions internes. Si nous avions plus de temps, nous parviendrions peut-être à le sauver. »
languages.original_text: "Drill Sergeant Ondzej Jovakha was struck by one of the Drover's maces. We sutured the wounds from the spikes, but he seems to have internal injuries. Given more time, we might find a way to help him."

traits.locale_text: « Le sergent-instructeur Ondzej Jovakha a été blessé par une des masses du Chasseur. Nous avons refermé les plaies causées par les épines, mais il semble avoir des lésions internes. Si nous avions plus de temps, nous parviendrions peut-être à le sauver. »

languages.text: "Çoban'ın topuzlarından biri, Talim Çavuşu Ondzej Jovakha'ya isabet etti. Dikenlerin açtığı yaraları diktik ama görünüşe göre iç organlarında hasar var. Biraz daha zamanımız olsa ona yardım etmenin bir yolunu bulabilirdik."
languages.original_text: "Drill Sergeant Ondzej Jovakha was struck by one of the Drover's maces. We sutured the wounds from the spikes, but he seems to have internal injuries. Given more time, we might find a way to help him."

traits.locale_text: "Çoban'ın topuzlarından biri, Talim Çavuşu Ondzej Jovakha'ya isabet etti. Dikenlerin açtığı yaraları diktik ama görünüşe göre iç organlarında hasar var. Biraz daha zamanımız olsa ona yardım etmenin bir yolunu bulabilirdik."

languages.text: "Drill Sergeant Ondzej Jovakha wurde von einer der Blüten des Treibers getroffen. Wir haben die Wunden von den Stacheln befreit, aber er scheint innere Verletzungen zu haben. Hätten wir mehr Zeit, könnten wir ihm vielleicht helfen."
languages.original_text: "Drill Sergeant Ondzej Jovakha was struck by one of the Drover's maces. We sutured the wounds from the spikes, but he seems to have internal injuries. Given more time, we might find a way to help him."

traits.locale_text: "Drill Sergeant Ondzej Jovakha wurde von einer der Blüten des Treibers getroffen. Wir haben die Wunden von den Stacheln befreit, aber er scheint innere Verletzungen zu haben. Hätten wir mehr Zeit, könnten wir ihm vielleicht helfen."

languages.text: «El sargento de instrucción Ondzej Jovakha recibió el golpe de una de las mazas del Pastor. Hemos cosido las heridas de las púas, pero parece haber sufrido lesiones internas. Si tuviéramos más tiempo, podríamos encontrar el modo de ayudarle».
languages.original_text: "Drill Sergeant Ondzej Jovakha was struck by one of the Drover's maces. We sutured the wounds from the spikes, but he seems to have internal injuries. Given more time, we might find a way to help him."

traits.locale_text: «El sargento de instrucción Ondzej Jovakha recibió el golpe de una de las mazas del Pastor. Hemos cosido las heridas de las púas, pero parece haber sufrido lesiones internas. Si tuviéramos más tiempo, podríamos encontrar el modo de ayudarle».

languages.text: “操练军士翁德泽·约瓦哈被拒生花的藤锤击中了。我们已经缝合那些尖刺造成的伤口，但他似乎还受了内伤。要是时间充裕，我们或许还能找到办法救他。”
languages.original_text: "Drill Sergeant Ondzej Jovakha was struck by one of the Drover's maces. We sutured the wounds from the spikes, but he seems to have internal injuries. Given more time, we might find a way to help him."

traits.locale_text: “操练军士翁德泽·约瓦哈被拒生花的藤锤击中了。我们已经缝合那些尖刺造成的伤口，但他似乎还受了内伤。要是时间充裕，我们或许还能找到办法救他。”
